name: Best Ever Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Thoroughly beat together egg, sugar, butter, and mashed bananas in another bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Fill greased muffin cups three-quarters full with the batter.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the top springs back when lightly touched.
6. Makes: 12 muffins
